title: perebea humilis
intro: Perebea humilis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, also known as the coffee family, native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Perebea humilis has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through decoction, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a treatment for various ailments.
